headline: The Acceleration Project & Truist Foundation Collaborate to Expand EDGE, the Financial Coaching Program for Small Businesses
summary: The Acceleration Project (TAP), a nonprofit empowering under-resourced small business owners through high-impact consulting and mentorship, announced today the expansion of its Economic Development & Growth for Entrepreneurs (EDGE) Program for small business owners, with support from Truist Foundation. TAP was recently awarded a grant from Truist Foundation, which has provided the resources to bring this 2-year program, strengthening personal and business financial health, to 500 low to moderate

headline: Truist patent boom fueled by AI & machine learning
summary: Truist is accelerating how innovation is developed and deployed across the organization. More teammates are submitting ideas, which helped drive a 63% increase in patent application filings over the past year. These results capture just one part of Truist's innovation story. A closer look at the patent activity shows that nearly half of patent application filings were AI-powered inventions, signaling Truist's deliberate effort to embed machine learning, advanced analytics and automation into cor

headline: BTIG Reaffirms Buy Rating for Praxis Precision Medicines (PRAX)
summary: Praxis Precision Medicines Inc. (NASDAQ:PRAX) is one of the 10 best AI driven biotech stocks to invest in. On June 2, BTIG reduced the price target on Praxis Precision Medicines Inc. (NASDAQ:PRAX) from $843 to $810. The firm maintained a Buy rating on the stock, informing investors that although the company’s Phase 2/3 POWER1 trial […]

headline: Truist Raises DELL Price Target to $360, Keeps Hold Rating
summary: Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL) is one of the 10 Best Performing Growth Stocks So Far in 2026. On June 1, Truist Securities increased its price target on Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE:DELL) from $170 to $360 while keeping a Hold rating on the stock. The research firm pointed to exceptionally strong demand and limited supply conditions. […]
